manifest.author: Spencer Gouw
manifest.description: A simple plugin for text snippets, with auto replacement
manifest.name: Jelly Snippets

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
2e1764a3bf486929c97f6a7a24a9cab4f0055de4 - fixed weird behavior with checkboxes.

The version upgrade represents the first bit of CodeMirror usage, which is preferable for editor changes at the least. The more CodeMirror-specific code I write, the more complex the extension gets. With any luck, if I implement more advanced features using that API, I'll be able to keep it simple.

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
Minor bugfix.

eba93321df5396458435fafdb6d219a35b2b8db5 - stop trimming LHS

NOTE: This change means you are now *required* to have newlines between snippets (i.e. one newline after the snippet divider). Wasn't required before, but it was strongly implied. Now it's required. If this breaks someone's heart, please submit an issue.

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description: Added semantic symbols in snippet RHS, e.g. whitespace, cursor ending position.

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
Rewrote snippet detection logic to be simpler and more flexible.

b8da7a9e10ac58497cbee3dba062c95c127ad73c - Rewrite, multiline LHS added (snippets with newlines in the LHS)

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
1b86e49dd38bce60cfead1f6aa5b641da7a3f019 Slight CSS adjustment.

f3d5309f440eff1243531fcaf938454d45b4f42f Add option for using a newline as a snippet divider.

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
BREAKING CHANGES; as with every release so far.

 
787db1af3f94970c528cf2faf6f3cf38bbbbad8b [feat: add options for whitespace or not after snippet trigger](https://github.com/rabirabirara/obsidian-jelly-snippets/commit/787db1af3f94970c528cf2faf6f3cf38bbbbad8b)


dcdb19e27d06a2631ed8841b46731cc4de65f815 [fix: triggerOnEnter should no longer undo!!!](https://github.com/rabirabirara/obsidian-jelly-snippets/commit/dcdb19e27d06a2631ed8841b46731cc4de65f815)



7170e629128974a86185d4cafeb14567abd7b474 [refac: use activeEditor, not getActiveViewOfType](https://github.com/rabirabirara/obsidian-jelly-snippets/commit/7170e629128974a86185d4cafeb14567abd7b474)

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
47b552e9185c3c2dd39c3bd4002b814f4cb84aad eb7544e2115f71ba6f6dd94fb02bec5354e5e110 feat: trigger on enter (and fixed whitespace occuring on trigger; TODO:
add option to reintroduce whitespace after snippet trigger)

eb7544e2115f71ba6f6dd94fb02bec5354e5e110 refac: move automatic triggers to their own function
triggerSearchSnippetAutomatically

90311f1b325c03d17ff55fc271df96cb195ce7cd fix: prevent snippet from replacing first instance of lhs in line to
latest through look-back-from-cursor comparison with lhs

066cdab34121d90b69f8420cfd287fc890777b20 fix: allow for snippet part divider in rhs

releases.author: rabirabirara
releases.description:
Two fixes:

b9a3f8f4662b5d473630573ffc5bfb36730ea342 (onTab updated onSpace instead of onTab)

906a9b3276a1ab81b2c7e13ce5197beb2b9c79d0 (searchsnippets did not clear old snippets when updating)
